# Koi by Rho Impact

> Koi delivers decision-grade avoided emissions forecasts and asset-level climate analytics for institutional investors and financial platforms. Built by Rho Impact, a research and modeling company that translates climate science into investment-ready data.

## What Koi provides

- Avoided emissions forecasts for 10,000+ climate technology models across 50+ geographies and 20+ industries
- Asset-level climate impact data (not industry averages) built from physics-based modeling, LCA databases, and technology diffusion curves
- The CRANE Tier: the de facto market standard for avoided emissions methodology, developed with Prime Coalition
- A public API for programmatic access to climate data (semantic search, GHG intensities, market data, emissions forecasting)

## Key pages

- Documentation home: https://docs.koi.eco
- Methodology overview: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/data-and-methodology/overview
- Avoided emissions: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/data-and-methodology/avoided-emissions
- Mathematical foundations: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/data-and-methodology/mathematical-foundations
- Classification system: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/data-and-methodology/classification-overview
- Terms and concepts: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/data-and-methodology/terms-and-concepts
- Koi data sources: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/data-and-methodology/koi-data
- Koi engine (AI acceleration): https://docs.koi.eco/docs/data-and-methodology/koi-engine
- Methodology alignment (WBCSD, Project Frame, GFANZ, CDP ECT): https://docs.koi.eco/docs/data-and-methodology/methodology-alignment
- API overview: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/api/overview
- API reference: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/api/reference
- Use cases: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/getting-started/use-cases
- FAQs: https://docs.koi.eco/docs/getting-started/faqs

## API access

- OpenAPI spec: https://rhoimpact-bucket-public.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/koi/openapi/openapi.json
- Authentication: API key with role-based permissions
- Capabilities: semantic search across climate technologies, market sizing, GHG intensity data, emissions forecasting

## About Rho Impact

Rho Impact is a research and modeling company. Koi is our flagship data product. We are co-creators of CRANE (with Prime Coalition), contributing authors to Project Frame methodology, members of the AEFDi Scientific Advisory Committee, and contributors to CDP's Emerging Climate Technology Framework.

- Company: https://rhoimpact.com
- Product: https://koi.eco
- Documentation: https://docs.koi.eco
